glancingBlow.title: Glancing Blow
glancingBlow.description: Emergency systems kick in and stabilize your mech. However, choose your mech is either @Compendium[world.status-items.Slowed] or @Compendium[world.status-items.Impaired].

systemTrauma.title: System Trauma
systemTrauma.description: Choose @Compendium[world.status-items.Jammed] or Trauma: Destroy a weapon or system of your choice.

directHit.title: Direct Hit
directHit.description: Choose @Compendium[world.status-items.Stunned] or Trauma: Destroy a weapon or system of your choice

crushingHit.title: Crushing Hit
crushingHit.description: Roll a HULL check or destroyed. Each lost Structure adds one difficulty. On a success, treat it as a single 1

emergencyShunt.title: Emergency Shunt:
emergencyShunt.description: Your mech’s cooling systems manage to contain the increasing heat; however, your mech becomes @Compendium[world.status-items.Impaired] until the end of your next turn.

powerFail.title: Destabilized Power Plant
powerFail.description: Your mech suffers catastrophic disruption to power regulation as it tries to divert energy to critical safety systems. Your mech is Choose @Compendium[world.status-items.Jammed] or @Compendium[world.status-items.Exposed].

criticalFail.title: Irreversible Meltdown
criticalFail.description: @Compendium[world.status-items.Exposed]. Additionally, make an ENGINEERING check or meltdown at the end of your next turn. Each lost Stress adds one difficulty. Meltdowns initiated this way can be canceled via Shut Down.
